mapper.insert:
/* 요금적용전력 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_charge_power ( site_id, std_date, charge_power, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.chargePower}, #{entity.regDate})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: /* 요금적용전력 상세조회 */ SELECT chg_pwr_idx, site_id, std_date, charge_power, reg_date FROM tb_charge_power WHERE chg_pwr_idx = #{chgPwrIdx}

/* 요금적용전력 목록조회 */ SELECT chg_pwr_idx, site_id, std_date, charge_power, reg_date FROM tb_charge_power
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}
